'''hanungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachcha|kachcha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachcha|kachcha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hanungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæningith|hæningith]] || [[word:hæningij|hæningij]] || [[word:hæningish|hæningish]] || [[word:hæningi|hæningi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanununguth|hanununguth]] || [[word:hanununguj|hanununguj]] || [[word:hanunungush|hanunungush]] || [[word:hanunungu|hanunungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanunguth|hanunguth]] || [[word:hanunguj|hanunguj]] || [[word:hanungush|hanungush]] || [[word:hanungu|hanungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanufngufth|hanufngufth]] || [[word:hanufngufj|hanufngufj]] || [[word:hanufngufsh|hanufngufsh]] || [[word:hanufnguf|hanufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanunguthu|hanunguthu]] || [[word:hanunguju|hanunguju]] || [[word:hanungushu|hanungushu]] || [[word:hanunguku|hanunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanunguth|hanunguth]] || [[word:hanunguj|hanunguj]] || [[word:hanungush|hanungush]] || [[word:hanungu|hanungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanunguthul|hanunguthul]] || [[word:hanungujul|hanungujul]] || [[word:hanungushul|hanungushul]] || [[word:hanungukul|hanungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanunguuthuthu|hanunguuthuthu]] || [[word:hanunguujuju|hanunguujuju]] || [[word:hanunguushushu|hanunguushushu]] || [[word:hanunguuku|hanunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanunguthun|hanunguthun]] || [[word:hanungujun|hanungujun]] || [[word:hanungushun|hanungushun]] || [[word:hanungukun|hanungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanunguthuoro|hanunguthuoro]] || [[word:hanungujuoro|hanungujuoro]] || [[word:hanungushuoro|hanungushuoro]] || [[word:hanungukuoro|hanungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
